signals.headline: Bitcoin Price Crashes 50% from October 2025 Peak to ~$64K Amid Massive Liquidations** | NO | HIGH confidence[1][2][4]
signals.raw:
Bitcoin Price Crashes 50% from October 2025 Peak to ~$64K Amid Massive Liquidations** | NO | HIGH confidence[1][2][4]

Bitcoin has plunged sharply today, shedding nearly $800B in market value since its October 6, 2025, high of ~$125K-$126K, now trading below $64K—its lowest since **April** 2025—and triggering over $1.1B in forced liquidations, primarily long positions[1][2][3].

signals.headline: Polymarket Trader "Prexpect" Profits $118K Betting on Elon Musk Tweets | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Polymarket Trader "Prexpect" Profits $118K Betting on Elon Musk Tweets | YES | HIGH confidence**  
A trader named Prexpect earned $118,754 by predicting Elon Musk's weekly tweet counts on Polymarket, using a real-time tracker to front-run market prices before they adjusted; a leaked Snapchat post revealed the wallet address and strategy, which gained ~340,000 views.[1]

signals.raw:
Active Elon Musk Tweet Markets Heating Up (e.g., Apr 17-24, 2026 Range) | YES | MED confidence**  
Polymarket's Tweet Markets, including "Elon Musk # tweets April 17 - April 24, 2026?" (e.g., "220-239" at 41% odds), show $21.5M+ volume across 20 live markets as of Apr 21; prices update in real-time with trader sentiment on pop culture events like tweet frequency.[2][4]
